protocol_note: Calibration rows are excluded from blind agreement metrics.

evidence_quotes: I want community.
rows.decision: Community is the explicit desired relational outcome; volunteering and the book club are context.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to have friends and community, and lasting relationships.
rows.decision: The response directly centers reciprocal friendship, community, and lasting relationships.

evidence_quotes: I want to be a full time painter.
rows.decision: Full-time painting establishes an ongoing creative practice without an audience outcome.

evidence_quotes: my dream is to have a dessert pastry shop
rows.decision: The pastry shop is an explicitly desired ongoing making and business practice.

evidence_quotes: my passion is helping people and doing humanitarian work
rows.decision: Direct help and humanitarian work are explicit; the luxury objects do not establish self-sufficiency.

evidence_quotes: Dream: To travel and see the world.
rows.decision: Travel and seeing the world directly establish movement autonomy.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to travel the world alone and enjoy my freedom
rows.decision: The response explicitly foregrounds independent travel and freedom.

evidence_quotes: Dream is to look after family.
rows.decision: Looking after family states durable responsibility for family wellbeing.

evidence_quotes: I just want to have done well enough to take care of me and mine and get to a point of being able to build a longer table.
rows.decision: The sustained horizon is family and household wellbeing, extending toward community continuity.

evidence_quotes: all I want is financial stability, a stable job🫠
rows.decision: Financial stability and stable work directly establish a dependable material base.

evidence_quotes: financial stability would be the biggest dream atm.
rows.decision: The material domain makes stability specific and explicitly central.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to be able to share what I have in my soul through art, writing, public speaking etc. and people not only to want to receive it, but to get truly touched from it!
rows.decision: Sharing creative expression with recipients and affecting them is the desired outcome.

evidence_quotes: I sing and I dance and I can act and I want to share it with the world.
rows.decision: The existing creative practices are context; sharing them with the world is the dream.

evidence_quotes: I dream of being free, financially stable, able to roam and return to a secure home.
rows.decision: Movement autonomy and a dependable financial and housing base are separately enumerated outcomes.

evidence_quotes: My only dream is to be able to live comfortably and get married to my partner.
rows.decision: Material comfort and committed partnership each remain meaningful when the other is removed.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to have a flower farm and do reiki there and run grief and healing circles.
rows.decision: The flower-growing practice and direct healing work are both explicit desired outcomes.

evidence_quotes: My dream would be to able to be rich enough to help animals and people in need and have my family continue my dream for generations.
rows.decision: Direct aid is primary; explicit intergenerational continuation independently establishes stewardship.

evidence_quotes: I want to create a movie. I want to tell a story.
I wanna put it out there. I want people to see it
I would love to travel and create travel and create travel and create.
rows.decision: This is a calibrated three-theme exception with separate making, audience, and travel aspirations.

evidence_quotes: i just want a slow life with the person i love the most
i want chickens and a cozy home and kids but i also wanna be a therapist or counselor
rows.decision: Relational home and family are central, with a separate direct-healing career aspiration.

evidence_quotes: My dream life would be to run some type of 3rd space that feels like home for people to connect with others, build found family/community and feel safe showing up as their truest selves.
rows.decision: The third space directly creates belonging and also establishes durable community infrastructure.

evidence_quotes: i’ve been dreaming about moving abroad, to live my life to the fullest without having to worry about income, and to bring an upgrade to my parents’ living conditions.
rows.decision: Moving abroad is the central autonomy outcome; improving parents' living conditions is a separate durable family commitment.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to structure my life so I can do whatever I want outside of capitalism and help build a new world alongside my community.
My dream is to help people set themselves free.
rows.decision: This is a calibrated three-theme exception: personal autonomy, durable community-building, and direct help are each explicit.

evidence_quotes: the dream would be to make a living wage as an artist (able to live comfortably, slowly and just create).
rows.decision: The dual-headed construction comparably elaborates creative practice and a dependable living wage.

evidence_quotes: my dream is to be happy
rows.decision: Happiness is a mood without a taxonomy domain.

evidence_quotes: What do I want? PEACE.
rows.decision: Peace alone does not establish one of the seven themes.

evidence_quotes: Dreams: hmmm 🤔
rows.decision: No current aspiration is stated.

evidence_quotes: no dreams, adhd keeps me changing goals every few days 😂😂😂
rows.decision: The response explicitly says there is no fixed current dream.

evidence_quotes: I don't really have dreams anymore.
rows.decision: The response explicitly states the absence of current dreams.

evidence_quotes: Dreams about exes also being trapped in school or being yelled at in school.
rows.decision: This is literal sleep-dream content rather than a desired life outcome.

evidence_quotes: I dont have any dreams or aspirations.
rows.decision: The response explicitly states that no current aspiration exists; enjoying the remaining time is acceptance, not a taxonomy outcome.

evidence_quotes: I grew up dreaming of being a writer but that's all I really cared about.
Now, I just want to feel stable.
rows.decision: Writing is explicitly past; current stability lacks a material or relational domain.

evidence_quotes: dream is recognition for the art i absolutely dont share
rows.decision: Recognition is status, and the response explicitly negates outward transmission.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to honestly be financially free so I can do whatever I want whenever I want like traveling or affording certain things.
rows.decision: The purpose construction makes money the means and autonomy over time and movement the endpoint.

evidence_quotes: My dream is to create art and just express my creativity.
I just want stability and consistency 🥲
rows.decision: Creative practice is concrete; later stability is emotionally contextual and materially unspecified.

evidence_quotes: I definitely dream of having my own home and moving freely in it and making it as comfy as I can for myself and my partner and cats
rows.decision: Physical home ownership anchors self-sufficiency; the separately coordinated partner-and-cats sanctuary establishes belonging.

evidence_quotes: my dream though, which is to have enough land to grow a food forest, and teach people about native plants and foraging.
rows.decision: Growing the food forest is cultivation; teaching plant and foraging knowledge is distinct transmission, not stewardship.

evidence_quotes: Dreams lol to have a stable, well paying freaking job.
I like to help, I want to help others around me
rows.decision: Stable work is primary, while the repeated explicit wish to help independently qualifies as service.

evidence_quotes: a quiet place a can call my own, close to nature, close to a city, that's beautiful and peaceful.
the knowing that I am somewhere where I have time and safety, and I can just be.
rows.decision: The safe sanctuary is primary; explicit time and space autonomy is co-dominant, without a dependable material-base claim.
